webServer.command: npx cross-env AUTH_TEST_MODE=1 npx next dev -p 3006

specs.title: login page loads and shows sign-in options
credentials login тЖТ redirect to dashboard
protected dashboard page shows user identity after login
session cookie is httpOnly
logout works and blocks access to dashboard
unauthenticated access to /dashboard redirects to /login with next param
session API does not expose tokens
CSRF token endpoint works
unauthenticated API request returns 401 JSON (not redirect)
authenticated API request returns 200
/api/auth/session is always accessible (public route)
/api/auth/providers is always accessible
redirect includes next param for return navigation
static assets are not blocked by middleware
dashboard loads and shows metrics
mark test completed updates last tested
activity tab shows events
automation section is visible on detail page
controls list page loads with filters and CTAs
create a new control and see detail
open control тЖТ create task тЖТ mark done
attach evidence тЖТ see it listed
mark NOT_APPLICABLE requires justification
reader user sees view-only controls
issues list page loads with filters and CTA
create a new issue and see detail
